data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. I'll filter for the "Integration" category.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is set to `true` in Directory.Build.props). The tests have categories "Unit" and "Integration", and the user wants to run only the Integration tests.

With MSTest v3 and the testing platform, to filter by category I should use `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-21af0ac0eed04c2b8a12582aac502965 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by category", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests filtered by category
